source:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Is it working?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Ship it]
  B -->|No| D[Debug]
  D --> B

flowchart LR
  client[Client] --> lb[Load Balancer]
  lb --> app1[App 1]
  lb --> app2[App 2]
  app1 --> db[(Database)]
  app2 --> db

flowchart LR
  A([Stadium]) --> B((Circle))
  B --> C{Diamond}
  C --> D[(Store)]

flowchart TB
  subgraph web[Web Tier]
    A[Nginx] --> B[App]
  end
  subgraph data[Data Tier]
    C[Cache] --> D[Postgres]
  end
  B --> C

flowchart TD
  A[Receive order] --> B{In stock?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Take payment]
  B -->|No| D[Notify customer]
  C --> E[Pack items]

flowchart LR
  A[Parse the request] --> B[Validate the payload] --> C[Persist to database]

sequenceDiagram
  Alice->>Bob: Authentication Request
  Bob-->>Alice: Authentication Response

sequenceDiagram
  Browser->>Server: GET /index.html
  Server->>Database: SELECT page
  Database-->>Server: rows
  Server-->>Browser: 200 OK

sequenceDiagram
  Client->>API: request
  loop every minute
    API->>API: poll status
  end
  API-->>Client: result

sequenceDiagram
  User->>Auth: login
  alt valid
    Auth-->>User: token
  else invalid
    Auth-->>User: error
  end

sequenceDiagram
  Producer->>Queue: enqueue job
  Queue->>Worker: deliver
  Worker-->>Queue: ack
